name: narratemyworld
description: Real-time AI audio descriptions for blind / low-vision users via Gemini Vision, ElevenLabs TTS, and Featherless model routing. Hosted on Firebase Hosting + Cloud Functions (2nd gen).

scripts.dev: npm run sync:src && firebase emulators:start --only hosting,functions
scripts.lint: echo 'Root has no source to lint. Run `npm run lint` inside functions/ for backend lint.' && exit 0
